other_observers: Seen with Bill Maynard, Aaron Shipe, Mark Peterson.; Found by Bill Maynard and Dan Maynard, seen by a few others.
specific_location: Private property near Willow Street in Canon City
description: Bill and Dan Maynard found a small flycatcher, early in the afternoon on private property on the Penrose Christmas Bird Count. Bill called me, and wondered if I could come over and try to get photos of the bird, since empidonax flycatchers are not expected in Colorado during the winter time. I came over there with Aaron Shipe, and we were able to see the bird and photograph it. The bird appeared to be a Hammond's Flycatcher, short mostly dark bill, a little tear drop to the back of the eyes, grayish head, yellow/greenish under tail.Behaviors: feeding over a streamCall: nonePlumage: winter
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
